hero.title: Precision in the service of care.
hero.subtitle: Althea Systems supplies healthcare professionals with premium medical equipment, curated for clinical reliability and ergonomics.
hero.lead: Althea Systems selects, certifies and delivers the cutting-edge gear that equips healthcare professionals. No noise, no compromise.

categories.title: Explore by specialty
categories.subtitle: Devices designed for every care environment.

trust.title: Trusted by healthcare institutions
trust.subtitle: Over 1,200 professionals trust us in France and internationally.

ctaFinal.headline: We equip those who will not compromise

product.vatIncluded: 20% VAT included · Shipping calculated at checkout
product.stockAvailable: {count, plural, one {# unit available} other {# units available}}

details.fallback: Product sheet is being drafted — contact us for the detailed documentation.
details.reviewsCopy: We hand-moderate every review to keep them relevant. Equip yourself today and share your feedback on delivery.

faq.deliveryA: 48 working hours in mainland France after order validation. A tracking number is sent as soon as the parcel ships.
faq.invoiceQ: How can I get a professional invoice?
faq.invoiceA: A compliant invoice is generated automatically with the intra-EU VAT number if provided at checkout.
faq.warrantyQ: What warranty applies to the equipment?
faq.warrantyA: 24-month warranty on parts and labor. Extensions available on request.

similar.subtitle: Hand-picked by our experts for their quality and complementarity with this equipment.

auth.createPerks: Order tracking, invoices and simpler purchases on future visits.
auth.guestCopy: Order without creating an account. You can still create one after purchase to track your order.

payment.secureVia: Secure payment via Stripe. Your data never passes through our servers.
payment.securedDesc: 256-bit SSL encryption, PCI-DSS level 1 compliance. Your banking details are processed directly by Stripe, certified by European banking authorities.
payment.cardCapturedOnStripe: Card entered on Stripe's secure page after confirmation.
payment.stripeRedirect: Redirecting to Stripe's secure page to enter your card.

hero.title: A dedicated contact, not an anonymous form.
hero.subtitle: Practice, clinic, care center or hospital: our sales team helps you equip your spaces with the best solutions on the market.

reach.title: Three ways to get in touch.
reach.subtitle: Choose the channel that suits you — we guarantee a human response, never automated.

rgpd.text: Your data is processed in strict compliance with GDPR. We never share it with third parties.

hero.title: Equipping caregivers with the standards they deserve.
hero.subtitle: Althea Systems is an independent European distributor of medical equipment, founded by healthcare professionals. We select, certify and deliver only what we would use ourselves.

footer.heading: Footer
footer.tagline: Your trusted partner for professional medical equipment. Quality, expertise and service.
